channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Igbo leader Solomon Ogbonna Eziko apologises to AmaRharhabe Kingdom after controversy
item.description: Solomon Ogbonna Eziko, referred to as the 'Igbo king', has apologised to the AmaRharhabe Kingdom after his supposed coronation sparked tension in KuGompo City. The ceremony, which took place on March ...

item.title: Driver urges safety review of Jaecoo 7 following sudden stall on busy road
item.description: Alan Lee, 37, from Birmingham, is calling for a safety review and possible recall of the Jaecoo 7 PHEX Luxury, also known as the 'Temu Range Rover', after his two-week-old vehicle stalled completely o...

item.title: Canada's Public Service Grapples with Union Conflicts and Misconduct Claims
item.description: Canada's public service is facing a complex web of challenges, including escalating disputes between unions and management, alongside serious allegations of misconduct within government departments. T...

item.title: UBS Initiates Coverage of WillScot with Neutral Rating
item.description: UBS has initiated coverage of WillScot (NASDAQ: WSC), a leading North American provider of modular space and portable storage solutions, with a neutral rating. The initiation comes as WillScot continu...

item.title: New EU Digital Border System Faces Delays as Airports Struggle with Implementation
item.description: The EU's new Entry/Exit System (EES), which requires biometric registration for non-EU nationals, has been rolled out across Europe today, but British tourists are facing severe delays at airports due...

item.title: Alex Iwobi's ‘More to Life’ explores his life beyond football through Afrobeats and UK sound
item.description: Super Eagles and Fulham player Alex Iwobi don launch him first music project, a nine-track EP wey him call 'More to Life'. The project, released under the stage name '17', show how Iwobi wan express h...

item.title: Trump condemns Biden administration after Haitian immigrant charged with fatal attack in Florida
item.description: Former President Donald Trump criticized President Joe Biden’s administration after a Haitian national, Rolbert Joachim, was charged with murdering a Florida mother in a violent hammer attack. The fat...

item.title: ADC Founder Ralph Nwosu Explains Dispute Over INEC's Monitoring and Leadership Issues
item.description: Ralph Nwosu, the pioneer national chairman and founder of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don talk for one interview say the party no dey disturbed about INEC refusal to monitor their national ...

item.title: Tanzania plans law to let graduates access loans using academic certificates
item.description: The Tanzanian government is preparing a new law that will allow university and professional graduates to use their academic certificates as collateral to access loans, a move expected to open financia...

item.title: Porterville Shooting: Detective Killed, Suspect Dies in Standoff Involving Armored Vehicle
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded in Porterville, California, on Thursday, April 9, 2026, resulting in the death of a Tulare County Sheriff’s Deputy and the subsequent death of a suspect during a bizarre sta...

item.title: Oxfam Reveals Trillions in Untaxed Wealth Widening Global Inequality
item.description: A decade after the Panama Papers exposed the vast scale of financial secrecy among the world’s elite, Oxfam’s latest analysis reveals that offshore wealth remains alarmingly high. According to the org...

item.title: Accountant Alleges Fraud by Nashik-Based Godman Ashok Kharat
item.description: A chartered accountant in Nashik has come forward with a serious allegation against Ashok Kharat, a local godman. The CA claims that Kharat is involved in a fraud amounting to a whopping Rs 8.76 crore...

item.title: Pope Leo Visits Africa Amid Challenges and Growth of Catholicism
item.description: Pope Leo’s April 2026 tour across Algeria, Angola, Cameroon, and Equatorial Guinea underscores Africa’s growing importance in global Catholicism. This 10-day visit is historically significant, linking...

item.title: Supreme Court Rejects Challenge to SK Candidate's Disqualification
item.description: The Supreme Court has firmly upheld the Commission on Elections' (Comelec) decision to cancel the certificate of candidacy (COC) of Merson Calubag, who was vying for a position in the Sangguniang Kaba...

item.title: Pawan Khera granted one-week anticipatory bail in forgery case filed by Assam CM’s wife
item.description: Congress leader Pawan Khera was granted a one-week transit anticipatory bail by the Telangana High Court after a case of forgery and criminal conspiracy was filed against him by Riniki Bhuyan Sarma, w...

item.title: South African Artist Zawadi Yamangu Reclaims Heritage and Challenges Patriarchy Through Music
item.description: South African artist Nkosingiphile Mpanza, known as Zawadi Yamangu, is carving a unique space within contemporary African music and culture. Her work powerfully combines Zulu folk traditions with cont...

item.title: World Snooker Championship 2026 Qualifiers: Key Matches and How to Watch

item.title: Philippines to Host US Refueling Depot Under EDCA, AFP Confirms
